items.body:
## Summary
- mark `^(animanch/redacted) as ignored in `.github/port.md`
- remove the stale `animanch.com` rule from `resources/fullfeed/items_all.json`
- update cache memory with the processed rule metadata

## Why
`(animanch.com/redacted) currently returns **403 Forbidden** at the top page, so this rule is not portable into `plus.json` under the migration workflow.

## Notes
- no `plus.json` change was needed because the site was unreachable
- local validation completed with the existing lint and test commands
items.title: chore: ignore blocked animanch rule
